name: healthpoint-rs
description: Read-only stdio MCP server for licensed Healthpoint HL7 FHIR API access.
long_description: healthpoint-rs provides read-only MCP tools, resources, resource templates, and prompts over the Healthpoint HL7 FHIR API. Users must provide their own licensed Healthpoint API key. The bundle contains no Healthpoint data or secrets.

tools.name: healthpoint_diagnostic_status
tools.description: Return redacted diagnostic status for the configured Healthpoint API connection. Never returns API keys or secret values.

tools.name: healthpoint_api_access_notes
tools.description: Show non-secret Healthpoint API access notes discovered from the licensed portal.

tools.name: healthpoint_access_policy
tools.description: Show conservative Healthpoint access and export policy before exporting or reusing data.

tools.name: healthpoint_search_services
tools.description: Search licensed Healthpoint HealthcareService records by text, category, service type, SNOMED, specialty, region filters, cursor, and result limit.

tools.name: healthpoint_search_by_snomed
tools.description: Search licensed Healthpoint HealthcareService records by SNOMED CT code in type, category, or specialty.

tools.name: healthpoint_find_nearby_services
tools.description: Find licensed Healthpoint HealthcareService records near a latitude/longitude point.

tools.name: healthpoint_get_service
tools.description: Read one licensed Healthpoint HealthcareService record by FHIR id.

tools.name: healthpoint_get_location
tools.description: Read one licensed Healthpoint Location record by FHIR id.

tools.name: healthpoint_get_organization
tools.description: Read one licensed Healthpoint Organization record by FHIR id.

tools.name: healthpoint_read_resource_uri
tools.description: Resolve and read a supported healthpoint:// resource URI using the same read-only provider path as native MCP resources.

resources.name: API access notes
resources.description: Non-secret Healthpoint API endpoint and access notes

resources.name: Access policy
resources.description: Conservative Healthpoint access and export policy

resource_templates.name: HealthcareService
resource_templates.description: Read one Healthpoint HealthcareService by FHIR id

resource_templates.name: Location
resource_templates.description: Read one Healthpoint Location by FHIR id

resource_templates.name: Organization
resource_templates.description: Read one Healthpoint Organization by FHIR id

prompts.name: healthpoint_safe_search
prompts.description: Draft a safe Healthpoint service-search request using licensed, read-only access.

arguments.name: need
arguments.description: Plain-language service need, such as immunisation, GP, or pharmacy

prompts.text: Search Healthpoint for ${arguments.need}. Apply only supplied filters. Return concise directory results with provenance, attribution, and no clinical advice. Do not expose API keys or cache/publicly redistribute returned data.

prompts.name: healthpoint_license_check
prompts.description: Prepare a license/export safety check before using Healthpoint data.
prompts.text: Before using Healthpoint data, check the access policy resource and confirm the use is local-only, attributed, read-only, non-production unless approved in writing, and not a bulk dump, public cache, resale, redistribution, competing directory, or AI-training dataset.

healthpoint_api_key.title: Healthpoint API key
healthpoint_api_key.description: User-provided licensed Healthpoint API key or token.
